Event: Darkness Castle Siege Dec 2024
Event Date: 12/12/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: AR149


Other locations the gear can be found
Siege Rammer Chest
Plush Corporal Plate Mail

Once in a while, the unit goes into a bestial frenzy. They increase in size, and all their stats increase by 25% for 5 sec. During this time, the unit can't affected by movement-restricting effects, stun, freeze, petrification, jelly, or fear. Also, during this time, the armor wearer removes 2 random debuffs every second and turns a random enemy to stone for 1,5 sec. The target can't move and takes 35% more damage during this time. When petrification wears off, the target's damage is reduced by 40% for 2 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
